calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Brenda Fields.
John Brown, Esq. for Plaintiff: Matt Nawrocki, present, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Printout of address for American United Bancorp----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Letter by plaintiff--------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Certified mail receipts--------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Unfiled declaration of Frank Scarpulla------------------ID/EVID.
Trial brief received in open court.
After hearing the evidence presented, matter was submitted and taken under submission.
Proposed judgment was received in open court.

On April 3, 2006, Commissioner Sue Kaplan granted and signed the judgment. Counsel to pick up exhibits and copy of the judgment in Dept. 218.
